---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

:::{.window-container}

:::{.window-header}
<span>Welcome!</span>
<div class="header-controls">
  <button class="header-btn" id="music-btn" onclick="toggleMusic()" title="Toggle ambient music">
    <i class="bi bi-music-note-beamed"></i>
  </button>
  <button class="header-btn" id="darkmode-btn" onclick="toggleDarkMode()" title="Toggle dark mode">
    <i class="bi bi-moon"></i>
  </button>
</div>
:::

:::{.window-body}

# Hi! [I'm Ariane]{.highlight}

### Scientist, Engineer, and Analyst

```{=html}
<audio id="ambient-audio" src="relaxing.mp3" loop></audio>

<div class="main-nav-icons">
  <div class="icon-item" onclick="openPopup('about')">
    <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
    <span>about</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item" onclick="openPopup('links')">
    <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i>
    <span>links</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item" onclick="openPopup('work')">
    <i class="bi bi-folder"></i>
    <span>work</span>
  </div>
  <div class="icon-item" onclick="openPopup('contact')">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope-at"></i>
    <span>contact</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Overlay backdrop -->
<div class="popup-overlay" id="popup-overlay" onclick="closeAllPopups()"></div>

<!-- ABOUT popup -->
<div class="popup-window" id="popup-about">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <span>about</span>
    <button class="popup-close" onclick="closePopup('about')">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body">
    <h3>Hi, I'm Ariane!</h3>
    <p>A Chemical and Pharmaceutical Graduate with a passion for data and visualisation! Currently, I'm completeting my master's degree in Business Analytics in hopes of combining my scientific and engineering background with my interest in uncovering  insights/patterns in data to make a positive impact. </p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LINKS popup -->
<div class="popup-window" id="popup-links">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <span>links</span>
    <button class="popup-close" onclick="closePopup('links')">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body">
    <div class="links-grid">
      <a href="https://github.com/ariane-damian" target="_blank" class="link-item">
        <i class="bi bi-github"></i><span>GitHub</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ariane-joie-damian-34027a1b8/" target="_blank" class="link-item">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i><span>LinkedIn</span>
      </a>
      <a href="mailto:ariane.damian2@gmail.com" class="link-item">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i><span>Email</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WORK popup -->
<div class="popup-window" id="popup-work">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <span>work</span>
    <button class="popup-close" onclick="closePopup('work')">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body">
    <h3>Projects & Experience</h3>
    <p>PLACEHOLDER</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CONTACT popup -->
<div class="popup-window" id="popup-contact">
  <div class="popup-header">
    <span>contact</span>
    <button class="popup-close" onclick="closePopup('contact')">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="popup-body">
    <h3>Get in touch!</h3>
    <p>The best way to reach me is by email:</p>
    <p><a href="mailto:ariane.damian2@gmail.com">ariane.damian2@gmail.com</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ── Popups ──────────────────────────────────────────
function openPopup(id) {
  closeAllPopups();
  document.getElementById('popup-' + id).classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('popup-overlay').classList.add('active');
}
function closePopup(id) {
  document.getElementById('popup-' + id).classList.remove('active');
  document.getElementById('popup-overlay').classList.remove('active');
}
function closeAllPopups() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.popup-window').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('popup-overlay').classList.remove('active');
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') closeAllPopups();
});

// ── Ambient music ────────────────────────────────────
let musicPlaying = false;
function toggleMusic() {
  const audio = document.getElementById('ambient-audio');
  const btn = document.getElementById('music-btn');
  if (musicPlaying) {
    audio.pause();
    btn.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-music-note-beamed"></i>';
    btn.classList.remove('active-btn');
  } else {
    audio.play();
    btn.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-music-note-list"></i>';
    btn.classList.add('active-btn');
  }
  musicPlaying = !musicPlaying;
}

// ── Dark mode ────────────────────────────────────────
let darkMode = false;
function toggleDarkMode() {
  const btn = document.getElementById('darkmode-btn');
  darkMode = !darkMode;
  document.body.classList.toggle('dark-mode', darkMode);
  btn.innerHTML = darkMode
    ? '<i class="bi bi-sun"></i>'
    : '<i class="bi bi-moon"></i>';
}
</script>
```
:::

:::
